title: ブライアンがヤキモチ？

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Thanks a bunch for the assist. You're a lifesaver!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spotting Hishi Amazon in the shopping district
with a slew of bags, I help her carry them back to
the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've been meaning to ask you—do you like
sweet stuff?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I made some sakura mochi this morning, so I'm
going to give you some as thanks for helping me
carry all this!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you! Okay, help yourself!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I'm happy to hear that. There's plenty more,
so eat up!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So this is where you were, Amazon.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Brian. Need something?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You're the one who said you wanted to give
me some of the sakura mochi you made.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Gaaah! I completely forgot about that! And I'm
fresh out!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Say what?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I gave some to Trainer as thanks for helping me
carry all my bags.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, come on. Don't glare like that. I'm the one
who offered.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm not glaring. This is just my face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says that... but I still feel like a sheep
cowering before a menacing wolf.
choice_data_list: Do you want me to go buy some sakura mochi?
Isn't there anything else we can give her?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Don't worry about it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: There's no point if it's not the mochi Amazon made.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Geez! If that's how you're going to be, then I'll
just have to make some more!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You don't mind?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, it was my fault for forgetting in the first
place, so it's up to me to take responsibility!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I'll be waiting.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to make a batch that tastes out of this
world, so make sure you stay nice and hungry!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! You're really putting me on the spot here...
All I can make right now is a few plain rice balls!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's good enough.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? You're fine with rice balls?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm hungry. Anything will do.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I guess you were really looking forward to my
mochi, huh. I'm really sorry about all this, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll have these rice balls whipped up in a
flash! Just tough it out a little longer!
